mapper.select: SELECT edge_id, sample_time, cpu_usage, CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END as memory_usage, total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} ORDER BY sample_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT edge_id, sample_time, cpu_usage, CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END as memory_usage, total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} AND sample_time >= #{startTime} AND sample_time <= #{endTime} ORDER BY sample_time ASC

WITH numbered_data AS ( SELECT edge_id, sample_time, cpu_usage, used_memory, total_memory, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sample_time) as row_num, COUNT(*) OVER () as total_count FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} AND sample_time >= #{startTime} AND sample_time <= #{endTime} ) SELECT edge_id, sample_time, cpu_usage, used_memory, total_memory FROM numbered_data WHERE total_count <= #{limit} OR MOD(row_num - 1, GREATEST(CEIL(total_count::numeric / #{limit}), 1)) = 0 ORDER BY sample_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}

choose.when: SELECT edge_id, date_trunc('hour', sample_time) + INTERVAL '5 minutes' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM sample_time) / 5) as sample_time, MAX(cpu_usage) as cpu_usage, MAX(CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END) as memory_usage, MAX(total_memory) as total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} AND sample_time >= #{startTime} AND sample_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY edge_id, date_trunc('hour', sample_time) + INTERVAL '5 minutes' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM sample_time) / 5) ORDER BY sample_time ASC

SELECT edge_id, date_trunc('hour', sample_time) + INTERVAL '10 minutes' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM sample_time) / 10) as sample_time, MAX(cpu_usage) as cpu_usage, MAX(CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END) as memory_usage, MAX(total_memory) as total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} AND sample_time >= #{startTime} AND sample_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY edge_id, date_trunc('hour', sample_time) + INTERVAL '10 minutes' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM sample_time) / 10) ORDER BY sample_time ASC

SELECT edge_id, date_trunc('hour', sample_time) + INTERVAL '30 minutes' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM sample_time) / 30) as sample_time, MAX(cpu_usage) as cpu_usage, MAX(CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END) as memory_usage, MAX(total_memory) as total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} AND sample_time >= #{startTime} AND sample_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY edge_id, date_trunc('hour', sample_time) + INTERVAL '30 minutes' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM sample_time) / 30) ORDER BY sample_time ASC

SELECT edge_id, date_trunc('hour', sample_time) as sample_time, MAX(cpu_usage) as cpu_usage, MAX(CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END) as memory_usage, MAX(total_memory) as total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} AND sample_time >= #{startTime} AND sample_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY edge_id, date_trunc('hour', sample_time) ORDER BY sample_time ASC

SELECT edge_id, date_trunc('day', sample_time) + INTERVAL '2 hours' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sample_time) / 2) as sample_time, MAX(cpu_usage) as cpu_usage, MAX(CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END) as memory_usage, MAX(total_memory) as total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} AND sample_time >= #{startTime} AND sample_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY edge_id, date_trunc('day', sample_time) + INTERVAL '2 hours' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sample_time) / 2) ORDER BY sample_time ASC

SELECT edge_id, date_trunc('day', sample_time) + INTERVAL '6 hours' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sample_time) / 6) as sample_time, MAX(cpu_usage) as cpu_usage, MAX(CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END) as memory_usage, MAX(total_memory) as total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} AND sample_time >= #{startTime} AND sample_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY edge_id, date_trunc('day', sample_time) + INTERVAL '6 hours' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sample_time) / 6) ORDER BY sample_time ASC

SELECT edge_id, date_trunc('day', sample_time) + INTERVAL '12 hours' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sample_time) / 12) as sample_time, MAX(cpu_usage) as cpu_usage, MAX(CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END) as memory_usage, MAX(total_memory) as total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} AND sample_time >= #{startTime} AND sample_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY edge_id, date_trunc('day', sample_time) + INTERVAL '12 hours' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sample_time) / 12) ORDER BY sample_time ASC

SELECT edge_id, date_trunc('day', sample_time) as sample_time, MAX(cpu_usage) as cpu_usage, MAX(CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END) as memory_usage, MAX(total_memory) as total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} AND sample_time >= #{startTime} AND sample_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY edge_id, date_trunc('day', sample_time) ORDER BY sample_time ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT edge_id, date_trunc('hour', sample_time) as sample_time, MAX(cpu_usage) as cpu_usage, MAX(CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END) as memory_usage, MAX(total_memory) as total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} AND sample_time >= #{startTime} AND sample_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY edge_id, date_trunc('hour', sample_time) ORDER BY sample_time ASC

mapper.select: SELECT edge_id, sample_time, cpu_usage, CASE WHEN total_memory > 0 THEN (used_memory * 100.0 / total_memory) ELSE 0 END as memory_usage, total_memory FROM edge_status WHERE edge_id = #{edgeId} ORDER BY sample_time DESC LIMIT 100
